app.title: Housing Arrears Rescheduling Request
login.title: Login Required
dashboard.form.title: Submit New Rescheduling Request
form.label.agreement: I agree to the deduction of up to 20% of my salary until my arrears are fully paid.
form.error.min: Value must not be less than 0.
form.error.minRemarks: Remarks must be at least 20 characters.
form.error.agreement: You must agree to the salary deduction.
form.error.docs: Please upload at least one salary certificate.
dashboard.status.desc.additional_info: We need additional information. Please update your application.
dashboard.status.desc.approved: Congratulations! Your rescheduling request has been approved.
dashboard.status.desc.rejected: We regret your request was not successful.
dashboard.status.desc.human_review: Your application has been escalated for human review.
